remarks: A unique opportunity to purchase a .35-acre buildable parcel in Stamford's desirable Shippan Point neighborhood. Offering flexibility for a variety of possibilities, this parcel is available for purchase on its own, or together with the adjacent residence at 1716 Shippan Avenue (MLS #24189368). Please inquire for additional details regarding the land, or the combined offering.
